meaning: adj.讨厌的,无礼的,攻击性的n.进攻,攻势
examples: They launched the offensive on January 10.
He was charged with carrying an offensive weapon.
He launched a charm offensive against opponents of the government.
Evangelicals in St Paul sighed that secular Democrats probably did not realise how offensive this was.
He also said he had received information that Iranian fighters were involved in the offensive.
